user.title: Solakon ONE — Entity Assignment
user.description:
Assign your Solakon ONE entities.

All further parameters (PI, zones, AC charging, tariff, surplus …) are configured in the **sidebar panel**.

[Documentation]({hint})

data_description.grid_power_sensor: Sensor measuring current grid power. Positive = consumption, negative = feed-in.
data_description.actual_power_sensor: Actual inverter output power — required for Self-Adjusting Wait.
data_description.solar_power_sensor: PV generation power — used for surplus detection and Zone 2 output limit.
data_description.soc_sensor: Battery state of charge in percent — controls zone transitions.
data_description.remote_timeout_countdown_sensor: Remaining time until the remote control mode resets automatically.
data_description.active_power_number: Target output power for the inverter — written by the PI controller.
data_description.max_discharge_current_number: Maximum discharge current in amperes — set zone-dependently.
data_description.remote_timeout_set_number: Timer value for mode reset (3598/3599 toggle mechanism).
data_description.mode_select: Inverter operating mode: Disabled / Discharge / AC Charge.
